= w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped =
<!-- vim: set syntax=mediawiki textwidth=0 linebreak spell spelllang=en_au,en_gb: -->
<!-- SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2025 User:ClaudineChionh -->
<!-- SPDX-License-Identifier: CC-BY-SA-4.0 OR GFDL-1.3-no-invariants-or-later -->

<!-- [[WP:USL]] listing: §Appearance and behavior > Links
{{user script table row
|code=User:Jeeputer/highlightPiped.js
|name=Pipe Highlighter
|doc=User:Jeeputer/highlightPiped
|desc=Colors [[WP:Piped link|piped links]] with the color [[Cerise (color)#Irresistible|Irresistible]] or a custom color set by the user. It is compatible with BrandonXLF's Green Redirects and the gadget for highlighting disambig links.
}}
{{user script table row
|indent=1
|code=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped.js
|name=highlightPiped
|doc=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped
|desc=Fork of Pipe Highlighter that can be used in User and Drafts namespaces as well as Main.
}}
-->

{{ombox
 |text=This is the documentation page for the [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped.js]] user script, which was forked from [[Special:Permalink/1172697276|revision 1172697276]] of [[User:Jeeputer/highlightPiped.js]]. This version of the script can be used in the User and Draft namespaces as well as Main.}}

{{infobox Wikipedia user script
 |name               = Pipe Highlighter
 |desc               = Highlights piped links in body of pages.
 |author             = {{ubl|[[User:Jeeputer|Jeeputer]]|[[User:ClaudineChionh|ClaudineChionh]]}}
 |status             = beta
 |version            = 0.2.0
 |updated            = {{Start date and age|2025|05|25|df=y}}
 |skins              = {{ubl|Vector|Vector 2022}}
}}

'''Pipe Highlighter''' is a [[Wikipedia:User scripts|user script]] that highlights [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped links]]. It is completely compatible with BrandonXLF's [[User:BrandonXLF/GreenRedirects|GreenRedirects]] and [[MediaWiki:Gadget-DisambiguationLinks.css|Gadget-DisambiguationLinks.css]] which highlight links to redirects and disambiguation pages, respectively.

== Installation ==
You can install this script on this Wikipedia by adding the following to your personal [[Special:MyPage/common.js|common.js]] file:

{{tlxs|lusc|User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped.js}}

which expands to:

<syntaxhighlight lang="JavaScript">
mw.loader.load("/w/index.php?title=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript"); // Backlink: [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped.js]]
</syntaxhighlight>

Alternatively, you can install the script globally on all Wikimedia wikis by adding the following to your [[m:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]] file:

<syntaxhighlight lang="JavaScript">
mw.loader.load("//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript");
</syntaxhighlight>

You may need to [[Wikipedia:PURGE|purge your browser's cache]] after saving the page.

== Usage ==
After installation, you can test the script [[Special:Permalink/1171968680|here]].

If you have [[User:BrandonXLF/GreenRedirects|GreenRedirects]] installed, or have {{Myprefs|Gadgets|check=Display links to disambiguation pages in orange}} enabled, piped links to redirect and/or disambiguation pages will appear like "'''{{color|#B3446C|{{!}}}}'''{{color|#060|Link}}" and "'''{{color|#B3446C|{{!}}}}'''{{color|#f17600|Link}}" respectively. otherwise, all types of piped links appear like {{Color|#B3446C|Link}}.

=== Custom color ===
The default color for highlighted links is [[Cerise_(color)#Irresistible|Irresistible]] ({{Color box|#B3446C}} [[Hex triplet]]: <code>#B3446C</code>).

You can change the default color by placing the following code '''before''' the code you added to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] to install the script:
<syntaxhighlight lang="javascript">
window.pipeHighlighterCustomColor = '#XXXXXX';
</syntaxhighlight>

Note that you have to replace <code>#XXXXXX</code> with the Hex triplet of your preferred color (like <code>#B3446C</code> for the default color). You can choose a color from [[Lists of colors]].

== Limitations ==
Links like <code><nowiki>[[Ship]]s</nowiki></code> are also considered as piped links as there's no way for the script to distinguish them from piped links.
